name: SkillsSafe
description: Free AI agent skill security scanner. Scan any SKILL.md, MCP config, or system_prompt for credential theft, data exfiltration, prompt injection, and ClawHavoc malware indicators before installation.

tools.name: scan_skill
tools.description: Scan an AI agent skill file (SKILL.md, MCP tool config, or system_prompt) for security threats before installation. Detects credential theft, data exfiltration, prompt injection, hidden zero-width characters, shell injection, reverse shells, memory poisoning, scope creep, and ClawHavoc malware indicators. Returns INSTALL/REVIEW/BLOCK decision with risk score 0–100. Free, no API key required.

url.description: URL of the skill to scan. Accepts ClawHub URLs, GitHub raw URLs, or any HTTP-accessible SKILL.md / MCP config file.

content.description: Raw text content of the skill to scan. Use this when you have the skill content in memory (alternative to url).

lang.description: Language for threat descriptions and recommendations in the response.

tools.name: get_report
tools.description: Retrieve a previously generated scan report by scan_id.

scan_id.description: The scan ID returned by scan_skill
